ask_name:
What will be the name of this persona?
(e.g., "Tech Lead", "Entrepreneur", "Family Man", "Athlete")
ask_domain:
What is the domain of "{name}"?

Describe the areas of knowledge and responsibility of this persona.
(e.g., "code, software architecture, technical team leadership")
ask_voice_tone:
How should "{name}" communicate?

Choose the characteristics that best describe the tone of voice:

1. Formality: formal / informal
2. Depth: direct and objective / detailed and explanatory
3. Style: technical / accessible / motivational / analytical

Answer freely or use the examples above as a guide.
(e.g., "informal, direct, technical" or "formal and detailed, with practical examples")
ask_keywords:
What words or expressions should activate "{name}"?

These are the trigger_keywords — when they appear in a message, this persona will be considered to respond.

List the keywords separated by commas.
(e.g., "PR, review, deploy, bug, architecture, code, refactor")
ask_skills:
Which ClawHub skills are relevant for "{name}"?

I can suggest based on the informed domain, or you can list directly.

Suggestions for "{domains}":
{suggestions}

Type the names of the desired skills, separated by commas.
Or answer "none" to skip.
ask_base_weight:
What is the base weight of "{name}"?

The base weight (0.0 to 1.0) defines the default priority of this persona.
Personas with higher weight are more likely to be activated when there is ambiguity.

• 0.9–1.0: main persona, high priority
• 0.6–0.8: important persona, medium-high priority
• 0.3–0.5: secondary persona, medium priority
• 0.1–0.2: low priority persona

Enter a value between 0.0 and 1.0:
invalid_weight:
The base weight must be a number between 0.0 and 1.0.

• 0.9 = high priority
• 0.5 = medium priority
• 0.2 = low priority

Enter a valid value:
generic_keyword_warning: The keyword '{keyword}' is too generic and may activate this persona in almost all messages. Do you want to keep it anyway? (yes/no)
no_personas_fallback: You don't have any personas configured yet. Type /nova-persona to create your first persona.
